text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Hanshin J.F. arrives, and Sweep
Tosho grows frustrated with Air Groove's endless
fretting.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She pouts, but instead of treating her like a child,
I let her know that I believe in her and send her
off to race.
